fact_nuggets.text: Shadow Shield (Japanese: Phantom Guard) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Lunala.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Shield reduces damage taken from damage-dealing moves by half when at maximum HP . It does not reduce the amount of HP taken from moves that deal direct damage . When hit with a multistrike move at maximum HP, only the first hit will have its damage reduced. All further hits will deal full damage. Unlike Multiscale , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . It can still be changed or suppressed. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Shield has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Shield reduces damage taken from damage-dealing moves by half when at maximum HP . It does not reduce the amount of HP taken from moves that deal direct damage . When hit with a multistrike move at maximum HP, only the first hit will have its damage reduced. All further hits will deal full damage. Unlike Multiscale , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . It can still be changed or suppressed.
When this Pokemon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.
